testcase.classname: index - registry hygiene (AC #10) does not call docRegistry.addFileType (must not override icons)
testcase.name: index - registry hygiene (AC #10) does not call docRegistry.addFileType (must not override icons)

testcase.classname: index - registry hygiene (AC #10) does not depend on IDocumentRegistry
testcase.name: index - registry hygiene (AC #10) does not depend on IDocumentRegistry

testcase.classname: index - activation message (AC #9) logs the exact activation message the UI test expects
testcase.name: index - activation message (AC #9) logs the exact activation message the UI test expects

testcase.classname: mapping - buildBlockMap orders blocks and starts the first block at line 0
testcase.name: mapping - buildBlockMap orders blocks and starts the first block at line 0

testcase.classname: mapping - cumulative line arithmetic across a fenced code block lands each block on its true source line (verifies the accumulator)
testcase.name: mapping - cumulative line arithmetic across a fenced code block lands each block on its true source line (verifies the accumulator)

testcase.classname: mapping - cumulative line arithmetic across a fenced code block round-trips line -> block -> line for the trailing paragraph
testcase.name: mapping - cumulative line arithmetic across a fenced code block round-trips line -> block -> line for the trailing paragraph

testcase.classname: mapping - cumulative line arithmetic across a fenced code block maps a line inside the code fence to the code block + preceding heading
testcase.name: mapping - cumulative line arithmetic across a fenced code block maps a line inside the code fence to the code block + preceding heading

testcase.classname: mapping - duplicate adjacent paragraphs (position, not content) resolves identical paragraphs to distinct ordinals and lines
testcase.name: mapping - duplicate adjacent paragraphs (position, not content) resolves identical paragraphs to distinct ordinals and lines

testcase.classname: mapping - empty/marker-only blocks guard (AC #5) returns -1 for a horizontal rule block
testcase.name: mapping - empty/marker-only blocks guard (AC #5) returns -1 for a horizontal rule block

testcase.classname: mapping - empty/marker-only blocks guard (AC #5) returns -1 for an out-of-range ordinal
testcase.name: mapping - empty/marker-only blocks guard (AC #5) returns -1 for an out-of-range ordinal

testcase.classname: mapping - nested list is a single top-level block treats the whole list as one ordinal
testcase.name: mapping - nested list is a single top-level block treats the whole list as one ordinal

testcase.classname: mapping - GFM table is a single top-level block treats the table as one ordinal at line 0
testcase.name: mapping - GFM table is a single top-level block treats the table as one ordinal at line 0

testcase.classname: mapping - headingSlug replaces spaces with hyphens on plain text
testcase.name: mapping - headingSlug replaces spaces with hyphens on plain text

testcase.classname: mapping - headingSlug strips inline markdown before slugging
testcase.name: mapping - headingSlug strips inline markdown before slugging
